name: Crock Pot Turkey+
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw the frozen turkey in the refrigerator until it is almost thawed (this may take different amounts of time depending on your refrigerator).
2. The next day, place the turkey breast in a large bowl with salt water (about 1 tbsp of salt per pound of turkey). Refrigerate overnight.
3. Slice the onions and add them to the bottom of the stockpot.
4. Pat the turkey dry with paper towels and sprinkle generously with garlic powder and paprika.
Cook for 4 1/2 hours on high.
